prose:
**Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**), in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided as an input `.xyz` file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`); the calculation was a single point on this fixed geometry, not optimized. SCF converged. Density fitting was off.

HOMO energy = -8.6037183 eV
LUMO energy = 0.33695037 eV
Frontier orbital gap ≈ 8.94067 eV

The calculation was trustworthy. No warnings were reported.
